title: PETTOM Slow Feeder Dog Bowl, Stainless Steel Dog Bowls to Slow Down Eating, Puzzle Feeders for Dogs Puppys Stop Bloat Anti Gulping Healthy Eating (Round - 21cm diameter)
features: 304 FOOD GRADE STAINLESS STEEL: The PETTOM slow feeder dog food bowl is made of SUS 304 food grade stainless steel, which is rust-proof, scratch-resistant and sturdy. It is not easily corroded by food like plastic or silicone dog bowls, or easily broken like ceramic dog bowls.
LARGE CAPACITY: This slow feeder dog bowl measures 21x21x4 cm and holds 2-3 cups of food, suitable for dogs with various mouth shapes, including brachycephalic and wide-faced dogs.
DOUBLE-SIDED DESIGN: The front side has a slow feeder function and the back side can hold different foods for your pet. Recommended for use with pet feeding pads (not included).
HEALTHY EATING: The rounded raised design not only slows down the dog's eating speed, but also prevents hurting the dog's mouth and nose.

EASY TO CLEAN: The slow feeder bowl has a curved interior that eliminates hard-to-reach corners and prevents bacteria from growing. It is dishwasher safe for easy cleaning and can also be sterilised at high temperatures.
description: Product Description Crafted from robust and non-toxic 304 stainless steel, this slow feeder dog bowl guarantees longevity and safety for your beloved pet. The back of the bowl is designed to hold various types of food, providing versatility for your pet's dining experience. The slow feeder dog bowl features a smooth, rounded curvature inside that is gentle on your dog's mouth and nose.
